name: ASRock H610M-HDV/M.2 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel H610 Chipset - Support DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI - DisplayPort - D-Sub - Intel Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock H610M-HDV/M.2 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel
description: Micro ATX Intel H610 motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with M.2 WiFi support and DDR4-3200.
